source: CIS ALIBABA CLOUD CONTAINER SERVICE FOR KUBERNETES (ACK) BENCHMARK V1.0.0
title: Ensure that the --audit-log-maxbackup argument is set to 10 or as appropriate

input_row.source: CIS ALIBABA CLOUD CONTAINER SERVICE FOR KUBERNETES (ACK) BENCHMARK V1.0.0
input_row.title: Ensure that the --audit-log-maxbackup argument is set to 10 or as appropriate
input_row.description: Retain	10	or	an	appropriate	number	of	old	log	files.
input_row.rationale: Kubernetes	automatically	rotates	the	log	files.	Retaining	old	log	files	ensures	that	you would	have	sufficient	log	data	available	for	carrying	out	any	investigation	or	correlation. For	example,	if	you	have	set	file	size	of	100	MB	and	the	number	of	old	log	files	to	keep	as 10,	you	would	approximate	have	1	GB	of	log	data	that	you	could	potentially	use	for	your analysis. Impact: None
input_row.audit: Run	the	following	command	on	the	master	node: ps -ef | grep kube-apiserver Verify	that	the	--audit-log-maxbackup	argument	is	set	to	10	or	as	appropriate.
input_row.remediation: Edit	the	API	server	pod	specification	file	/etc/kubernetes/manifests/kube- apiserver.yaml	on	the	master	node	and	set	the	--audit-log-maxbackup	parameter	to	10 or	to	an	appropriate	value. --audit-log-maxbackup=10 Default	Value: By	default,	auditing	is	not	enabled. References: 100	|	P a g e 1. https://kubernetes.io/docs/admin/kube-apiserver/ 2. https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/cluster-administration/audit/ 3. https://github.com/kubernetes/features/issues/22 Additional	Information: This	control	cannot	be	audited	and	modified	in	ACK	managed	clusters. CIS	Controls: Version	6 6.3	Ensure	Audit	Logging	Systems	Are	Not	Subject	To	Loss	(i.e.	rotation/archive) Ensure	that	all	systems	that	store	logs	have	adequate	storage	space	for	the	logs generated	on	a	regular	basis,	so	that	log	files	will	not	fill	up	between	log	rotation	intervals. The	logs	must	be	archived	and	digitally	signed	on	a	periodic	basis. Version	7 6.4	Ensure	adequate	storage	for	logs Ensure	that	all	systems	that	store	logs	have	adequate	storage	space	for	the	logs generated. 101	|	P a g e
input_row.references: 100	|	P a g e 1. https://kubernetes.io/docs/admin/kube-apiserver/ 2. https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/cluster-administration/audit/ 3. https://github.com/kubernetes/features/issues/22 Additional	Information: This	control	cannot	be	audited	and	modified	in	ACK	managed	clusters. CIS	Controls: Version	6 6.3	Ensure	Audit	Logging	Systems	Are	Not	Subject	To	Loss	(i.e.	rotation/archive) Ensure	that	all	systems	that	store	logs	have	adequate	storage	space	for	the	logs generated	on	a	regular	basis,	so	that	log	files	will	not	fill	up	between	log	rotation	intervals. The	logs	must	be	archived	and	digitally	signed	on	a	periodic	basis. Version	7 6.4	Ensure	adequate	storage	for	logs Ensure	that	all	systems	that	store	logs	have	adequate	storage	space	for	the	logs generated. 101	|	P a g e
input_row.justification: The verification of the `--audit-log-maxbackup` argument for the kube-apiserver requires direct inspection of process arguments or configuration files on the Kubernetes master node. Alibaba Cloud APIs, CLI, or managed ACK console do not expose this parameter for managed clusters, nor is it available through Alibaba Cloud Config, Log Service, or CloudMonitor. Both AI opinions correctly note that automation is not feasible with current Alibaba Cloud capabilities, as this check requires SSH access and manual inspection.
input_row.manual_summary: 1. **Gain SSH Access:** - Securely SSH into the master node of your Kubernetes cluster. This may require a bastion host or VPN, depending on your network setup. 2. **Check kube-apiserver Process:** - Run the following command: `ps -ef | grep kube-apiserver` - Review the output for the presence and value of the `--audit-log-maxbackup` argument. 3. **Verify Configuration File (Optional):** - Optionally, inspect the kube-apiserver manifest file (commonly `/etc/kubernetes/manifests/kube-apiserver.yaml`) to confirm the argument is set as required. 4. **Expected Secure Configuration:** - The `--audit-log-maxbackup` argument should be set to `10` or another organization-approved value. 5. **Confirm Compliance:** - Compliance is confirmed if the argument is present and set to the required value. If not, remediation is necessary.
input_row.default_value: By default, auditing is not enabled.
input_row.additional_information: This control cannot be audited and modified in ACK managed clusters.

step1_initial_assessment:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Manual

**APPROACH DECISION:**
The control requires checking the `--audit-log-maxbackup` argument directly from the kube-apiserver process or its configuration file. This is not exposed via Alibaba Cloud's managed Kubernetes environment or through any APIs, making it impossible to automate this check. Thus, SSH access is necessary for verification.

**MANUAL STEPS:**
1. **Gain SSH Access:** 
   - Securely SSH into the master node of your Kubernetes cluster. This may require a bastion host or VPN, depending on your network setup.
   
2. **Check kube-apiserver Process:** 
   - Run the following command: 
     ```
     ps -ef | grep kube-apiserver
     ```
   - Review the output for the presence and value of the `--audit-log-maxbackup` argument.

3. **Verify Configuration File (Optional):**
   - Optionally, inspect the kube-apiserver manifest file (commonly `/etc/kubernetes/manifests/kube-apiserver.yaml`) to confirm the argument is set as required.

4. **Expected Secure Configuration:** 
   - The `--audit-log-maxbackup` argument should be set to `10` or another organization-approved value.

5. **Confirm Compliance:** 
   - Compliance is confirmed if the argument is present and set to the required value. If not, remediation is necessary.
